Team would be GRamona + Thais, Hameln with the 4th Slot going to your Choice of Awakener
In your case, it could probably be either Aigis, Faint, Leigh or Ryker
What's a good fourth slot for Xu? I'm running Xu, Agrippa, Thais, GDoll but something feels off with Thais
Looks good…?
It feels like my poison DPS is a bit low is all
It also feels v unrewarding compared to Aequor lol

I mean-
Poison is always gonna be slow to stack unless you have invested Awakeners. The most you can do with this team is get Inferno to “Finale 10” as quick as you can and Thais Exalt Inferno 3 costs for more Exalts, and then Poison Application. Agrippa will apply more Poison as you stack more STR, and Xu is there to proc the Poison with Inferno.
Hence why Poison isnt recommended most of the time unless you got <:rich:1356085282604322826> <:rich2:1357181559945564170>
I see... thanks. Just wanted to make Xu work (and also cos I was bored of playing aequor all the time)
Everyone has their own likes and dislikes. I say keep testing teams and realms and archetypes and mechanics, until you find and know which you like and enjoy. To each their own~
Xu isn’t everyones cup of tea and that is perfectly fine, mhm mhm~

I actually like poison a lot and the rotation of it, the damage just feels very lacking when I can unga bunga on aequor but it is what it is. I also haven't touched ultra at all so let's see what I can do. Thanks!

Yea…. Poison just isn’t very “wallet friendly” but useable if you are fine with clearing slowly and playing the sustain game, in this game. You also brought up another point where other comps/Awakeners can just do upfront damage quicker. Some people are diehard Poison players and will want to make it work no matter what, but that’s not for me~ Try Ultra and see how it feels. Mhm~ No problem~
Daffodil works as a DPS or Support. Teams vary depending on what you have access to, unless you are trying to build a “ideal” team.
DPS can work as STR Stacking Daff, Poison, or Counter. Little disclaimer ahead of time, Daffodil is a tad *outdated* but if you want to make her work, go for it <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
